# Rahul Ranjan - Independent SEO Expert & Digital Marketing Consultant

> Independent SEO Expert and Digital Marketing Consultant based in Biratnagar, Nepal. Technical SEO, Google Analytics 4, social media marketing, lead generation, and content strategy. Also a Full Stack Developer (React, Node.js, Django). Director of Marketing at Dragon Insurance (US-based). Available for freelance SEO and digital marketing projects globally.

## About Rahul Ranjan

Rahul Ranjan is an independent SEO expert and digital marketing consultant based in Biratnagar, Koshi Province, Nepal. He specialises in technical SEO implementation, keyword strategy, Google Analytics 4, lead generation, and content marketing for Nepal businesses and international clients.

He currently serves as Director of Marketing at Dragon Insurance, a US-based insurance company, managing all digital marketing, SEO strategy, GA4 analytics, and lead generation remotely from Nepal. This is live proof of what he delivers: international-standard digital marketing output from Biratnagar, Nepal.

His strongest differentiator: Rahul is also a Full Stack Developer (React, Node.js, Django, PostgreSQL). This means he implements SEO changes directly in code -- no waiting on a separate developer, no briefing handoffs. A technical SEO audit becomes actual fixes on the same day.

**Technical Skills:**
- SEO: Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/INP), schema markup (JSON-LD), keyword research, content strategy, internal linking, Google Search Console, Semrush Pro
- Analytics: Google Analytics 4, Looker Studio, conversion tracking, event configuration, Search Console integration
- Digital Marketing: Social media strategy (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn), paid ads (Google Ads, Meta Ads), email marketing, lead generation
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Django, Python, REST API design
- Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Linux server management

**Nepal-specific expertise:**
- Local keyword research for Nepal market (Semrush Pro data)
- eSewa and Khalti payment gateway integration
- Nepal Telecom / Ncell SMS API
- KYC compliance for Nepal SaaS products
- Nepal business directory citations for local SEO

## SEO & Digital Marketing Services

### SEO Expert Services Nepal
Technical SEO audit and implementation for Nepal businesses and international clients.
- Technical SEO audit (Core Web Vitals, crawlability, schema, on-page): NPR 15,000--30,000
- Audit plus implementation: NPR 30,000--80,000
- Monthly retainer (ongoing SEO management): NPR 20,000--50,000 per month
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/seo-services-nepal.html
- Primary keywords targeted: seo expert in nepal, seo specialist nepal, technical SEO nepal

### Digital Marketing Services Nepal
Full-service digital marketing: SEO, social media, Google Analytics 4, lead generation.
- Starter package (SEO plus GA4): NPR 20,000--35,000 per month
- Growth package (SEO plus social plus analytics): NPR 45,000--70,000 per month
- Full stack package (all channels plus paid ads): NPR 80,000+ per month
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/digital-marketing-nepal.html
- Primary keywords targeted: marketing company in nepal, digital marketing services nepal, social media marketing agency nepal

### SEO Training Nepal
1-on-1 advanced SEO coaching for Nepal professionals who want to learn SEO and get online freelancing work.
- Per session (2 hours): NPR 5,000
- Full coaching package (8 sessions): NPR 30,000
- Covers: technical SEO, keyword research with Semrush, GA4 setup, schema markup, portfolio building, freelancing strategy
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/seo-training-nepal.html
- Primary keywords targeted: advanced seo training in nepal, seo training in nepal

### Website Design & Web Development Nepal
Custom website design and web development for Nepal businesses.
- Basic business website: NPR 15,000--40,000 (1--2 weeks)
- E-commerce website: NPR 60,000--150,000 (3--6 weeks)
- Custom web app or SaaS MVP: NPR 200,000+ (2--4 months)
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/web-development-nepal.html
- Primary keywords targeted: website design in nepal, web design company in nepal, web development company in nepal

### React.js and Next.js Development Nepal
React and Next.js applications for Nepal startups and businesses.
- Basic Next.js website: NPR 30,000--70,000
- React dashboard: NPR 60,000--150,000
- Full stack React plus API: NPR 150,000+
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/react-development-nepal.html

### SaaS Development Nepal
Multi-tenant SaaS platforms from MVP to production.
- SaaS MVP: NPR 200,000--400,000
- Full-featured SaaS: NPR 500,000--1,200,000
- URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/saas-development-nepal.html

## Blog Content

### Local SEO Nepal: How to Rank on Google Maps (2026 Guide)
Complete guide to local SEO for Nepal businesses. Covers how Google ranks businesses in the local pack (relevance, distance, prominence), step-by-step Google Business Profile setup and verification for Nepal addresses, building Google Reviews, LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema with Nepal-specific fields (addressCountry: NP), local citation building across Nepal directories (Yellow Pages Nepal, Hamrobazaar, Justdial), NAP consistency, and on-page local SEO signals. Includes a table of Nepal citation sources with priority ratings. FAQ covers: what is local SEO in Nepal, how to rank on Google Maps, how long it takes, and whether a website is required.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/local-seo-nepal.html
Target keywords: local seo nepal, google business profile nepal, google maps ranking nepal, local search nepal, local seo for nepal businesses

### How to Increase Website Traffic in Nepal: 9 Methods (2026)
Practical guide to increasing organic and overall website traffic for Nepal businesses. Covers 9 specific methods: (1) fixing technical SEO and Google Search Console indexing issues including Cloudflare settings that block Googlebot, (2) Nepal-specific keyword research using Ahrefs and Google Keyword Planner with Nepal targeting, (3) mobile optimisation for Nepal's 90%+ mobile traffic with PageSpeed Insights fixes, (4) Google Business Profile for local traffic, (5) content marketing targeting Nepal search intent, (6) internal linking structure, (7) Nepal business directories for citation and referral traffic, (8) Facebook and Instagram for top-of-funnel traffic, (9) Google Analytics 4 tracking and data-driven improvements. Includes a 3-phase priority order (first 30 days, days 31-90, days 91-180). FAQ covers: how long it takes, free traffic methods, why a site gets no traffic, and social media effectiveness in Nepal.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/increase-website-traffic-nepal.html
Target keywords: increase website traffic nepal, organic traffic nepal, website traffic nepal, how to get more website visitors nepal

### Freelance SEO Expert in Nepal: Why Hire One Over an Agency (2026 Guide)
Complete comparison guide for Nepal businesses deciding between a freelance SEO expert and an SEO agency. Covers: definition of a freelance SEO expert in Nepal, cost comparison table (freelance NPR 15,000-60,000/month vs agency NPR 40,000-150,000+), who actually does the work (direct expert vs junior staff), 5-step vetting checklist for hiring (check if they rank their own site, ask for traffic data case studies, request a free mini-audit, check LinkedIn, start with one-time project before retainer), red flags (guaranteed rankings in 30 days, vague deliverables, no transparent reporting), Nepal-specific skills to look for (Cloudflare knowledge, mobile-first optimization, Ahrefs vs Semrush for Nepal data, Cloudflare issues, Nepali search query patterns), and pricing table for all SEO service types. FAQ covers: what is a freelance SEO expert Nepal, how much they charge, agency vs freelance comparison, how to find one, and what monthly service should include.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/freelance-seo-expert-nepal.html
Target keywords: freelance seo expert nepal, seo freelancer nepal, freelance seo nepal, hire seo freelancer nepal, independent seo expert nepal

### SEO Expert in Nepal: How to Find and Hire One (2026)
Comprehensive guide for Nepal businesses looking to hire an SEO expert. Covers what an SEO expert does, what to pay (pricing in NPR), 7 questions to ask before hiring, red flags, and freelance vs agency comparison. Includes full FAQPage schema with 7 Q&As.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/seo-expert-nepal.html
Target keywords: seo expert in nepal (2,900/mo, KD 27), seo specialist nepal, hire seo expert nepal

URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/technical-seo-checklist-nepal.html

### Google Analytics 4 Setup Guide for Nepal Businesses (2026)
Step-by-step GA4 setup for Nepal business websites. Covers property creation, tracking code, custom event tracking, conversion goal configuration, and Search Console integration.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/google-analytics-4-guide-nepal.html

### SEO, GEO, AEO and AI Search 2026: Complete Nepal Strategy
Guide to SEO strategy in 2026 covering Google AI Overviews, Perplexity citations, schema for AI extraction, and how Nepal businesses should approach generative engine optimisation (GEO) and answer engine optimisation (AEO).
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/seo-geo-aeo-ai-search-2026.html

### Web Development Cost in Nepal (2026)
Comprehensive pricing guide for websites in Nepal. Covers basic sites (NPR 15K--50K), e-commerce (NPR 50K--2L), and SaaS (NPR 2L+). Includes freelancer vs agency comparison and actual rates.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/cost-of-web-development-nepal.html

URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/how-to-hire-web-developer-nepal.html

### Next.js vs React for Nepal Startups (2026)
Technical comparison of Next.js and React for Nepal businesses. Covers SEO implications, performance on Nepal's 4G network, and a decision framework.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/nextjs-vs-react-nepal-startups.html

### MERN Stack Guide 2026
Analysis of MERN stack in 2026. Covers strengths, weaknesses vs PERN and Django, and recommendations for Nepal startups.
URL: https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/blog/mern-stack-guide-2026.html

## Projects and Work History

### Dragon Insurance Services (Current)
Director of Marketing and Technology at Dragon Insurance Services (mydragon.us), a US-based insurance company. Manages all digital marketing, SEO strategy, Google Analytics 4 implementation, lead generation, and social media as a remote engagement from Biratnagar, Nepal.

### Foxnett Bulk SMS SaaS Platform (Past)
Lead Developer of the Foxnett Bulk SMS SaaS platform in Nepal. Multi-tenant system with eSewa payments, role-based access control, async SMS queuing via Redis/BullMQ, KYC onboarding, and REST API documentation in PHP, Python, Node.js, and cURL.

### Website Scanner Tool
Python-based tool for automated SEO auditing of Nepal business websites.
GitHub: https://github.com/rranjanr/website_scanner
Audits: crawlability, canonical tags, schema markup, page speed, mobile responsiveness.

### EduQuiz AI Quiz Platform
AI-powered quiz generation platform built with React and Django. Dynamic question generation, scoring, progress tracking, and multiple quiz categories.
